text.title: Spec-Kit Three-Step Pipeline (specify → plan → tasks) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the task-spec-kit-three-step methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: run-specify
step.action: Invoke `/speckit.specify`, fill the template, resolve every [NEEDS CLARIFICATION].

step.name: run-plan
step.action: Invoke `/speckit.plan`, cite constitution sections in the Gate block.
step.decision-gate: If constitution evidence is missing, STOP.

step.name: run-tasks
step.action: Invoke `/speckit.tasks`, label parallel-safe tasks `[P]` with file-overlap proof.

step.name: commit-three
step.action: Commit all three under `.speckit/` with one PR per pipeline run.

step.name: drive-agent
step.action: Pass tasks.md (and only tasks.md) as the coding-agent prompt; reference spec/plan via Read tool.
